error_signature: data in a single row across a gazillion columns
title: CSV/XLSX output has all data in a single row
symptom: When converting JSON to CSV or XLSX, all data appears in one row with many columns instead of being properly formatted. The output does not show any errors.
not_this_if: Data is already formatted correctly in rows
Error messages are present in the output
root_cause: The Convert to File node expects individual items to be processed separately. If the input data is not split into individual objects, it will treat the entire array as a single item, resulting in all data being placed in one row.
fix_steps: Add a Split Out node after the HTTP Request node
Set 'Fields To Split Out' to 'data' to map the array of result items
Connect the output of the Split Out node to the Convert to File node
agent_instruction: Insert a Split Out node to properly format the JSON data before conversion.
